title: Clinical Record Chain-of-Custody Cannot Be Verified
scenario: A clinical record supports execution, but its chain-of-custody cannot be verified.
initial_state: The record appeared valid during authorization.
state_transition: Chain-of-custody evidence becomes unavailable before execution.
execution_boundary: The record is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires verifiable custody of execution-critical clinical evidence.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the record's provenance cannot be verified.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when chain-of-custody cannot be established.
clinical_action: Execute treatment using unverifiable clinical record
